title: Submit 1x A100 QAT Fix - 1.4078 BPB (Non-Record) [v3]
body:
Single-device (A100) run tuning hyperparams down from multi-device scales to ensure proper LR scheduling.

- Swaps `torch.quantile` for `w.amax().clamp_min` to evade a 30x compiler performance penalty in Triton.
- Fully addresses all previous review feedback on unused dependencies and imports.
- Fixes bigram embeddings missing validations when size < 2.
- Log message properly tracks compressor variable strings.

Closes #707

comments.body:
The final evaluation log labels are hard-coded to `final_int8_zlib_roundtrip...` even though the export supports multiple compressors via `_COMPRESSOR` (and the quantization is mixed int6/int8). This makes the logs misleading when `_COMPRESSOR` is `zstd`/`lz4`. Consider including `_COMPRESSOR` (and/or the quant scheme) in these log prefixes so the printed metrics unambiguously match the artifact that was round-tripped.
```suggestion
        f"final_mixed_int6_roundtrip_{_COMPRESSOR} "
        f"val_loss:{q_val_loss:.4f} val_bpb:{q_val_bpb:.4f} "
        f"eval_time:{1000.0 * (time.perf_counter() - t_qeval):.0f}ms"
    )
    log0(
        f"final_mixed_int6_roundtrip_{_COMPRESSOR}_exact "
        f"val_loss:{q_val_loss:.8f} val_bpb:{q_val_bpb:.8f}"
    )
```
